subcodes.first_line: The All-Merciful hath testified in the Kingdom of Utterance that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared is the Hidden One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد الرحمن فی ملکوت البیان انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر انه هو الغیب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action
